result.finding: No explicit hardware requirements documented. Based on the application profile (Spring Boot 3.3 with Java 17, MySQL dependency, Caffeine in-process cache), estimated minimum requirements are: 512MB–1GB RAM, 1 CPU core, 500MB+ disk. No README, INSTALL.md, docker-compose resource limits, or Kubernetes resource requests/limits specify formal requirements.
evidence: No README.md or INSTALL.md with system requirements found
Spring Boot 3.3 application with embedded Tomcat: ~256-512MB JVM heap typical
Caffeine in-process cache: minimal additional memory
MySQL external database: external host, separate resource allocation required
values: Disk: ~500MB for application JAR and logs (estimated)
Additional: MySQL server requires separate resources (min ~512MB RAM)
Note: These are estimates; no formal requirements documented
